problem.title: LeGO-LOAM throughput and accuracy trade-off on the third repository-stored Istanbul sequence
problem.question: Which LeGO-LOAM profile should stay as the current default on a third public Istanbul window?

variants.label: KITTI default
variants.intent: Ground-aware LeGO-LOAM baseline for HDL-64E (n_scans=64, sensor height ~KITTI).

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarser surf sampling and lighter odometry/mapping Ceres budgets.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Finer features and deeper optimization passes.
